## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate and refocus content strategy to drive qualified enterprise leads for Firework.](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content metrics (clicks, CTR) don't align with business goals; need to shift focus to lead quality and enterprise pipeline impact](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [New tracking implementation required to measure article performance based on lead generation and enterprise account engagement](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Content strategy to be refined: fewer, higher-quality pieces targeting enterprise pain points, with industry-specific variations](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics Realignment

  - [Current focus on clicks and CTR is misaligned with business goals](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Need to track leads generated per article, distinguishing between SMB (PLG) and enterprise (SLG) leads](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Implement UTM parameter for blog post names to enable granular tracking](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)
  - [Retroactively analyze which articles attracted enterprise accounts that converted](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Shift from volume to quality: produce fewer, more impactful articles](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Focus on enterprise pain points and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Create "anchor" content pieces with multiple industry-specific derivatives](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Develop comparison guides and vendor evaluation content to capture bottom-funnel searches](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

### Industry Focus

  - [Prioritize top industries: beauty, consumer electronics, apparel, fashion, athletic wear, grocery](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [De-emphasize lower-priority sectors like healthcare](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
  - [Adapt successful content (e.g., Easter campaigns) across priority industries](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

### Upcoming Thought Leadership Content

  - ["2025 Video Commerce Research Report"](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - ["2025 Video Commerce Global Blueprint"](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement UTM tracking for blog post names (Yi Jin, Cameron)](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Generate report on enterprise leads and article-level conversions (Prateek, Ritesh, Cameron)](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review insights (within 2-3 days)](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Prepare pre-read with learnings and 10 proposed topics based on insights](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Proceed with Easter-themed content for priority industries](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Hold off on previously planned 13 new articles pending strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/i3z_BRKLViy5wgusZohyR3N8yzJgWbY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
